chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2773 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 16.04.2025 Mr. Khan Zaman Khattak, advocate for applicant Mr. Sarfraz Ali Mangi, Special Prosecutor ANF ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this criminal bail application and seeks direction for earlier disposal of the case. Special Prosecutor ANF has recorded no objection. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of two months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
